name: Jack Gilford
abstract: Jack Gilford (born Jacob Aaron Gellman; July 25, 1908 – June 4, 1990) was an American Broadway, film, and television actor. He was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor for Save the Tiger (1973).

concerts.label: Artists' Tribute to the Life of Paul Robeson (1898-1976)

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: I did a show called Alive and Kicking... It had Jack Gilford, Carl Reiner, and David Burns. They were three of the principals.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
